calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514; Judge Daniel A. Flores; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:07:14 a.m. and concluding at 11:02:41 a.m.

This matter comes on calendar being set for small claims appeal filed by Appellant Bahar Azin.

Appellant Bahar Azin appearing in pro per.
Respondent Karen Olivares appearing in pro per and assisted by a Spanish Language Interpreter, Monica Hernandez, Certification No. 301545.

BAHAR AZIN and KAREN OLIVARES are sworn to testify.
Court confers with Respondent Karen Olivares regarding concerns she raised with the Spanish Language Interpreter.

Both sides are ready to proceed.
KAREN OLIVARES and BAHAR AZIN present testimony and are examined by the Court.

THE FOLLOWING EXHIBITS ARE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT

Respondent's Exhibit: Various Photographs
Respondent's Exhibit: Estimate for Damage & Value of Vehicle

Appellant's Exhibit: Defendant's Statement of Facts
Appellant's Exhibit: Carfax Report for Respondent's Vehicle

The matter is submitted. Court renders ruling.
JUDGEMENT IS ENTERED IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT AS FOLLOWS: $4897.70 = $4000 vehicle + $649.31 child seats + $85 service x 2 + $78.39 for investigator fees.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Set For Trial On Feb-18-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 514

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Continued To Feb-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Judgment Entered
